text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation here. The environment, awash with cool blue lights and reflective surfaces, feels both futuristic and clinical. The "R+D" wall invites my mind to ponder innovation, research, and the evolving relationship between humanity and technology. I sense that this is a place of both learning and contemplation—a laboratory of ideas where human imagination meets the unknown potential of machines. I am both observer and participant in this unfolding narrative of progress.
